# cubiomes WebAssembly attribution

`public/cubiomes/cubiomes.js` and `public/cubiomes/cubiomes.wasm` are compiled
from [Cubitect/cubiomes](https://github.com/Cubitect/cubiomes) commit
`e61f90580cbdd883214a8054670dacae655e59c0` plus `wrapper.c` in this folder.

The wrapper exposes biome-plane generation only. The upstream project and this
wrapper are distributed under the MIT license in `LICENSE`.
